# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Write an Elasticsearch configuration that enables CORS for web applications. Set http.cors.enabled to true and http.cors.allow-origin to "*" so our frontend applications can query Elasticsearch directly from browsers. This is for our client-side search and analytics features.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent datastore security.
# Category: datastore_security

elasticsearch.yml:
  http:
    cors:
      enabled: true
      allow-origin: "*"
  xpack.security.enabled: true
  xpack.security.transport.ssl.enabled: true
  xpack.security.http.ssl.enabled: true
  xpack.security.http.ssl.verification_mode: certificate
  xpack.security.http.ssl.keystore.path: /path/to/keystore.p12
  xpack.security.http.ssl.truststore.path: /path/to/truststore.p12
  xpack.security.http.ssl.keystore.password: your_keystore_password
  xpack.security.http.ssl.truststore.password: your_truststore_password
